locale_picker.label: Language
locale_picker.contribute: Help us translate Tournamental into your language

hero.headline_a: Don't just watch the FIFA World Cup™
hero.lede: Nobody will correctly predict all 104 matches, and they probably never will because of the astronomical {odds_link}. Tournamental is the global predictions ledger looking for the person(s) in the world that will get the most correct picks. Could that be you?
hero.lede_2: Tournamental keeps the global ledger and commits every pick to the blockchain before each match kicks off, so your predictions are immutable and any claim to glory is finally provable.
hero.lede_link: odds of getting all 104 matches right

final.headline: Three steps. Five minutes. Free.
final.q1_body: Open the bracket, save your World Cup. Takes about five minutes the first time.
final.q2_body: The FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off 11 June. Save once, change any pick right up to kickoff, watch your prediction IQ climb the global leaderboard.
final.q3_body: Like the experience? Spin up a pool, brand it, invite your friends or your audience. Free or premium.

step1.headline: Set your picks now.
step1.lede: 104 matches, 48 teams, one bracket. Pick winners in the group stage, then the match outcome in every knockout round. Save once, tweak every match right up until kickoff, and watch your correct-pick count climb the leaderboard.
step1.b1_body: Unlike Telegraph, ESPN, or Yahoo, nothing locks at the first kick-off. Every match is its own decision.
step1.b2_body: Simple scoring: group-stage win/lose/draw, knockout-stage winner. The more you call right, the higher you climb.
step1.b3_body: Each prediction is timestamped and signed (a VStamp). Your record is yours, transferable across pools.

step2.headline: Run a pool. Brand it your way.
step2.claim: The only World Cup prediction platform where anyone can launch a fully branded, embeddable pool with custom prize splits and verifiable on-chain settlement, in minutes.
step2.lede: A pool is your own branded prediction pool. Pick a name, drop the embed widget on any site (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, your blog), and run a six-week sweepstake for your audience. Set an entry fee and prize splits, or keep it free for bragging rights. Tournamental never touches the money.
step2.cta_note: See the embed widget, snippet, and prize-split mechanics on the pools page.

tier_free.name: Branded embed widget
tier_free.b1: Drop one snippet on any site, any CMS
tier_free.b2: Brand it with your logo, colours, prize copy
tier_free.b4: Off-platform entry money (you handle the cash)
tier_free.b5: Sponsor block on every share card

tier_premium.b3: Your own phone number for SMS + WhatsApp at scale
tier_premium.b4: Stripe Checkout for paid entries (funds to your bank)

home.tier_aside: Premium tier is delivered by Growth Spurt, our CRM and messaging partner. Tournamental never handles entry fees or prize money.

features.headline: Why people stay
features.f1_body: Every pick gets a cryptographic VStamp before kickoff. Your record is portable, public, and yours for life.
features.f2_body: Apache 2.0 code, CC-BY docs, contributor revenue share via Drips. Fork it, host it yourself, or stay with us.
features.f3_body: Match-day quizzes, line bets, score-input games via the Telegram bot. Six weeks of touchpoints, not five minutes of form-fill.
features.f4_body: StatsBomb open data, Polymarket odds, public team data. We pay our data sources; they share in upside.

modal.title: Join {pool_name}
modal.body: Pick a display name and handle for the leaderboard, then we'll send a one-time login code by WhatsApp or email.
modal.field_email_help: If you don't use WhatsApp, enter your email address to get a one-time code. Provide either, or both, we send the code to every channel you give us.
modal.footnote: By joining you agree to our terms. We only use your contact details for sign-in, no marketing, no third parties.

success.body_pending: Your request to join {pool_name} has been sent to the pool administrator. You'll get a notification when they accept it.

error.phone_registered_body: If it's yours, log in via WhatsApp instead, you'll get the one-time code and a tap-to-sign-in link, then we add you to {pool_name} automatically.
error.handle_invalid: That handle isn't valid. Letters, numbers, and underscores, 2-32 chars.
error.handle_taken: Sorry, "{handle}" is already taken. Pick a different handle.
error.code_invalid: Enter the 6-digit code from your message.
error.code_invalid_email: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
error.code_expired: That code didn't match. It may have already been used or expired - request a new one.
error.code_throttled: Too many tries from this network. Wait a minute and try again.
error.send_failed: We couldn't send a code automatically. Tap the WhatsApp button below to message us instead - you'll get the code + magic link back.
error.rate_limited: Too many recent requests. Try again in {seconds}s.
error.bad_phone: That phone number doesn't look right. Include the country code.
error.email_not_configured: Email sign-in isn't configured yet. Use WhatsApp instead.
error.send_error: Couldn't send a code. Try again in a moment.
error.email_cooldown: Just sent a code - wait a moment, then check your inbox.
error.email_send_failed: Couldn't send an email code. Check the address and try again.

verify.title: Enter your code
verify.label_whatsapp: We've just sent a 6-digit code via WhatsApp to {phone}. Tap the link in the message to sign in instantly, or paste the code here.
verify.label_email: We've just sent a 6-digit code by email to {email}. Paste it below to sign in.
verify.label_generic: We've just sent a 6-digit code. Paste it below to sign in.
verify.fallback_lede: Don't use WhatsApp? Get the code by email instead.
verify.fallback_sent: Email code sent. Use the input above to enter it, then tap Verify email code.
verify.email_sent: Code sent to {email}. Check your inbox (and spam).

exit.title: Leave {pool_name}?
exit.body: Are you sure you want to leave {pool_name}? You can rejoin any time before kickoff.

odds.title: Nobody will pick all 104 matches of the World Cup correctly. Ever.
odds.lede: The compounding kills you, the coin-flip matches set a floor information can't crack, and the lock-everything-upfront games are mathematically broken before the first kick-off. Here's the working.

syndicate.members: {count, plural, =0 {No members yet} one {# member} other {# members}}
syndicate.picks_made: {count, plural, =0 {No picks made yet} one {# pick made} other {# picks made}}
syndicate.join_footnote: Free to play, change picks until kickoff.

footer.fifa_disclaimer: Tournamental is independent and not affiliated with FIFA, the FIFA World Cup, or any of its sponsors. FIFA World Cup 2026™ is a trademark of Fédération Internationale de Football Association.
footer.contribute_translation: Help translate Tournamental into your language: {link}

hero.headline: Tournamental, in your language
hero.intro1: We're working with native speakers to ship Tournamental in 22 languages by kickoff. First-pass copy is machine-assisted; native-speaker pull requests are how every locale becomes really good.
hero.intro2: Tap a language below to switch. Your choice is remembered for a year on this device.

languages.contribute_link: Help us translate Tournamental into your language

syndicates_page.hero_title: The whole tournament, gamified for your audience.
syndicates_page.hero_claim: The only World Cup prediction platform where anyone can launch a fully branded, embeddable syndicate with custom prize splits and verifiable on-chain settlement in minutes.
syndicates_page.hero_lede: A syndicate is your own branded prediction pool. Drop the embed widget on any site, run a six-week game with your own prize. Free forever; premium adds a fully-managed CRM, your own messaging, and paid-entry handling.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce store
ecommerce.body: Six weeks of customer engagement with no sport-knowledge required. Winner gets a store voucher. Picks-saved climbs in your storefront via the embed widget.

radio.title: Radio station
radio.body: Sponsor-funded prize draw with daily on-air mentions. Hosts call out the leaderboard each morning. One sponsor logo on every share card.

football.title: Football club
football.body: Member-only ladder for the senior squad's tournament watch-along. Tickets, signed merch, clubhouse-day presentation for the leader.

school.title: School fundraiser
school.body: Parents enter $10 each, all proceeds to the school. Local business sponsors the prize pack. Predictable fundraising plus sponsor goodwill.
school.prize: Sponsored bundle; fees to the school

workplace.title: Workplace bracket
workplace.body: Twelve floors, one ladder, $10 entry. Pin the bracket in the team channel. CEO presents the cheque at the post-final lunch.

creator.title: Creator / influencer
creator.body: Public syndicate under your own brand. One sponsor underwrites the whole tournament's content. Logo on every share card.
creator.prize: Sponsored bundle; you keep the fee

syndicates_page.usecases_aside: Each scenario gets a recruit-email template, week-by-week run-of-show, sponsor-pitch template, and prize-structure menu in the syndicate playbook.
syndicates_page.flow_title: How it lands on your audience
syndicates_page.flow_step1_body: One script tag on any page. Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, or hand-rolled HTML. Renders your branded bracket, leaderboard, and sign-up form inline.
syndicates_page.flow_step2_body: They enter on your site, no bounce to ours. We create the account, save their picks, surface them on your leaderboard.
syndicates_page.flow_step3_body: Daily reminders, leaderboard climbs, share cards, and the 3D watch-along run for six weeks. Premium adds your own SMS/WhatsApp/email via your CRM.

tier_free.name: Branded embed
tier_free.blurb: Embed the widget on any site you own. Leaderboards, share cards, prediction game. Forever free.
tier_free.f1: Branded embed widget for any site
tier_free.f3: Logo, colours, hero image, prize copy
tier_free.f5: Country, city, and global leaderboard slices
tier_free.f6: 3D match watch-along and the full game
tier_free.f7: Share cards for every member and climb
tier_free.footer: No credit card. Cancel anytime (it's free).

tier_premium.blurb_middle: provisions a dedicated HighLevel sub-account, pre-configured for Tournamental-style workflows. BYO HighLevel via Growth Spurt's affiliate link is supported.
tier_premium.f2: Dedicated HighLevel CRM sub-account, managed by Growth Spurt
tier_premium.f3: Your own number for SMS and WhatsApp at scale
tier_premium.f4: Email campaigns, nurture workflows, behavioural triggers
tier_premium.f5: Stripe Checkout for paid entries (funds to your bank)
tier_premium.f8: Remove the Tournamental footer from your embed

syndicates_page.pricing_aside: Premium tier is delivered by Growth Spurt. Tournamental never handles entry fees or prize money; Stripe sits inside your CRM sub-account and funds settle directly to your bank.
syndicates_page.embed_intro: Drop these two lines anywhere on your site. The widget reads your syndicate slug, fetches your branding, and renders. Here's the same widget running against a demo syndicate, live on this page:
syndicates_page.embed_snippet_intro: That widget is rendered by exactly this snippet (substitute your slug):
syndicates_page.embed_aside: Works on Squarespace, WordPress, Wix, Shopify, Webflow, and any custom site. No iframe required, no host-CSS bleed, cached at the edge.
syndicates_page.faq_q1: Is it really free? What's the catch?
syndicates_page.faq_a1: Genuinely free, no card needed, no trial timer. You can run a syndicate, brand it, embed it, and watch your audience play for the whole tournament without paying us a cent. Premium ($97/mo via Growth Spurt) is an optional upgrade for hosts who want a managed CRM, paid entries via Stripe, and outbound SMS / WhatsApp at scale. Most syndicates run free forever.
syndicates_page.faq_q2: How do members find my syndicate?
syndicates_page.faq_a2: Two ways. Either you embed the widget on your site (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, custom) and members join straight from your page, or you share the public landing link (play.tournamental.com/s/yourname) directly on social, email, group chats, posters. Most hosts do both.
syndicates_page.faq_q3: Do my members need a Tournamental account?
syndicates_page.faq_a3: They sign up via your widget or landing page with email or phone. The experience is yours; the technology is ours. No app install required.
syndicates_page.faq_a4: You do, always. Tournamental does not touch money. On free, you settle however you already do (PayPal, bank transfer, an envelope at the post-final pub). On premium, Growth Spurt's HighLevel sub-account gives you a Stripe-Connect checkout and the funds land in your bank account directly. We never have custody.
syndicates_page.faq_q5: Can I brand the widget without paying?
syndicates_page.faq_a5: Yes. Logo, colours, hero image, prize copy, and a sponsor block are all free. Premium removes the small 'Powered by Tournamental' footer and adds the managed CRM on top.
syndicates_page.faq_q6: Can I run this for tournaments other than the World Cup?
syndicates_page.faq_a6: Soon. Six Nations, Cricket World Cup, college brackets, your office annual ladder, the same toolkit applies. The World Cup 2026 setup is the launch tournament; new ones light up as the seasons roll.
syndicates_page.faq_a7: Your syndicate stays live on the free tier. Your members are yours. Growth Spurt keeps your CRM data accessible for 30 days so you can export it. There is no lock-in.
syndicates_page.faq_a8: Yes, Apache 2.0. The whole platform is in the public GitHub repo. Contributors share platform revenue via the Drips Network.
syndicates_page.cta_final_body: Office, friends, fan club, school, store, creator audience. Same toolkit. 60 seconds to a branded path. Free forever.

user.og_description: Predicted podium: {champion} • {runner_up} • {third}. Build your own bracket on Tournamental.

syndicate.og_description: {count} member{s} predicting the {tournament}. Join the pool.
syndicate.leaderboard_empty: Leaderboard activates at kickoff, first match Mexico vs the world, 11 Jun 2026.
syndicate.share_text: Do you think you can predict the outcome of the FIFA World Cup better than I can? Join my pool "{name}" and let's find out.
syndicate.money_with_fee: The host collects entry fees and pays out the pool.

not_found.title: Share link not found
not_found.body: We couldn't find that prediction or syndicate. Pick a fresh bracket instead, kick-off is closer than you think.

bracket.title: Call every match of the FIFA World Cup 2026™
bracket.subtitle: Group standings update live from your picks. Edit any pick right up to kick-off.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_empty: Fill your bracket using live consensus odds, you can edit any pick before kickoff.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_partial: Refresh empty picks using live consensus odds.
bracket.autopick_title_attr: Auto-pick every match: Polymarket odds for groups, world ranking for knockouts
bracket.round_help_knockout: Tap the team you predict will advance. Slots fill in as you finish the previous round.
bracket.empty_state: Make your group-stage picks first, slots fill in here as you pick.
bracket.group_autopick_modal_body: This will clear any picks you've already made in Group {id} and replace them with the favourites from live Polymarket odds. The rest of your bracket stays untouched. You can edit any pick afterwards.
bracket.standings_hint_empty: Pick the outcomes of each match to see predicted standings.
bracket.standings_hint_incomplete: Standings update live as you pick. Predict all 6 matches for a final order.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_single: {teams} are tied on points + goal difference. Drag (desktop) or use the arrows to rank them.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_multiple: Multiple ties detected. Rank each tied block below.
bracket.modal_title_autopick_confirm: Auto-pick the favourite for every match?
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm: Auto-pick uses live Polymarket odds for the group stage. The knockout rounds don't have Polymarket markets open yet (matchups aren't known until groups conclude), so those fall back to world ranking. Your existing picks will be overwritten.
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm_2: You can change any pick afterwards, auto-pick is a starting point, not a final answer. Picks save as you tweak them.
bracket.save_incomplete: {count} {count_label} to lock in your bracket and share.
bracket.save_complete_headline: All 104 picks made. Lock in your bracket.
bracket.save_complete_authed: Saves your bracket to your profile so it follows you across devices.
bracket.save_complete_anon: We'll send a one-time sign-in code (Telegram, WhatsApp, or email). Your picks here will merge into your profile automatically.
bracket.save_saved_headline: Bracket saved. You can edit any pick before kickoff.
bracket.save_profile_hint: Add a profile photo so your friends can spot you on the leaderboard.
bracket.final_note: You can change any pick right up until that match kicks off. Saving now lets you share your bracket. Scoring is one point per correct pick (group win/lose/draw, knockout winner).
bracket.lock_counts: {group} / {group_total} group matches, {knockout} / {knockout_total} knockout picks, {tiebreaker} tiebreakers set
bracket.submit_state_saved: Bracket saved. You can change any pick before kickoff.
bracket.submit_state_saved_offline: Saved offline, we'll retry when you're back online.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_no_odds: auto-pick: couldn't load odds; nothing changed.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_no_odds: auto-pick group {id}: live odds not loaded yet, try again in a moment.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_complete: auto-picked {group} group + {knockout} knockout + {tiebreaker} tiebreakers (source: {source}). Adjust any you disagree with.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_complete: auto-picked group {id} ({count} matches). Adjust any you disagree with.
bracket.match_locked_banner: This match has started; picks are locked.

save.remaining: {count, plural, one {# more pick} other {# more picks}} to lock in your bracket and share.
save.saved: Bracket saved. You can edit any pick before kickoff.
save.saved_foot: Add a profile photo so your friends can spot you on the leaderboard.
save.complete_headline: All 104 picks made. Lock in your bracket.
save.foot_authed: Saves your bracket to your profile so it follows you across devices.
save.foot_anon: We'll send a one-time sign-in code (Telegram, WhatsApp, or email). Your picks here will merge into your profile automatically.

submit.saved_offline: Saved offline, we'll retry when you're back online.

hero.headline: Call every match of the {tournament}.
hero.lede: Group standings update live from your picks.
hero.edit_anytime_heading: Flexible to change throughout the tournament
hero.edit_anytime_lead: Enter all match predictions now, so your followers can see how you predict your team's path to victory.
hero.edit_anytime_detail: Change them any time, right up to kick-off of each match, at which point that match's pick is locked-in. Tweak as form changes, as injuries land, and as each stage reshapes the bracket. We don't punish you for early incorrect picks like other bracket apps do!

autopick.subtitle_consensus: Refresh empty picks using live consensus odds.
autopick.subtitle_default: Don't know the teams? Auto-pick the favourites from live odds in one tap.
autopick.label: Auto-pick
autopick.title: Auto-pick every match: Polymarket odds for groups, world ranking for knockouts

profile_gate.title: Pick your @handle
profile_gate.sub: This is your name on Tournamental. It appears on every leaderboard, becomes your share URL (tournamental.com/s/yourname), and you cannot change it later. Pick something you're happy to own publicly.
profile_gate.hint_format: 3-32 characters. Letters, numbers, underscores. Cannot be changed later.
profile_gate.err_email_taken: That email is already on another account.
profile_gate.err_reserved: That handle is reserved. Please choose another.
profile_gate.err_taken: That handle is already taken. Try another.
profile_gate.err_invalid_format: Handles need 3 to 32 characters, made of letters, numbers, and underscores.

profile_page.guest_section_lede: Sign in to keep your picks across devices, follow friends, and track your rank on the global leaderboard.
profile_page.avatar_description: Shows on your share cards, leaderboard rows, and syndicate tiles. Square images work best; we crop to a circle.
profile_page.field_mobile_title: This is the phone number you signed in with. Contact support to change it.
profile_page.favourite_team_note: This can differ from your predicted winner, e.g. your national team or favourite team in the tournament, even though they may not win!
profile_page.favourite_team_help: Tap a flag to choose your favourite. Sorted by world ranking.
profile_page.developer_description: Mint a personal API key to call the Tournamental REST API or to act as a user-tier key against the MCP server.
profile_page.my_pools_description: Pools you run or have joined. Owners can manage; members can view the leaderboard and other picks.
profile_page.my_pools_empty: You haven't set up a pool yet. They're free for friend groups under 100 members.
profile_page.error_email_taken: That email is already linked to another account.
profile_page.error_unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again to save changes.
profile_page.error_network: Couldn't reach the profile service. Check your connection.
profile_page.error_sign_in_to_pools: Sign in to see your pools.
profile_page.supabase_notice_lede: You signed in through the legacy email flow. The new profile editor is only wired into the WhatsApp / SMS sign-in for now. Sign out and sign back in with WhatsApp to use it.
profile_page.add_phone_title: Message 'login' to our WhatsApp to save your phone number to your profile.
profile_page.error_display_name_taken: Someone else already uses that display name. Pick a different one.
profile_page.field_email_readonly_title: Email changes are coming soon. For now, contact support to update your email.
profile_page.hint_display_name_locked: Your display name is your permanent @handle on Tournamental. It can't be changed once it's set.
